summary: Executed backend regression (pytest) and UI integration checks for startup/env readiness, email/password auth, revenue→strategy trigger path, mission/logging, reports, and privacy controls. Core unauth guard routes pass, but authenticated flows remain blocked by Prisma SQLite native binding failure and static bundle 500s.

critical.issue: Demo credential login returns 401 because user lookup cannot reach DB when Prisma fails to load better-sqlite3 binding.
Valid signup payload returns 400 (Invalid input). Route catches infrastructure/runtime exceptions and masks them as validation errors.
Authenticated business flows are blocked because account creation/login fail upstream.

minor.issue: tests/test_rpc_*.py still fallback to localhost if REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL is missing, which conflicts with strict env-only endpoint policy.

ui_bugs.issue: Critical CSS/JS chunks under /_next/static/* return HTTP 500; UI renders mostly unstyled default browser layout.
Direct /dashboard route returns HTTP 500 (not a functional authenticated app experience).

integration_issues.issue: Submit stays on /login? and does not create session.
Submit stays on /register? and does not redirect to onboarding.

integration_issues.flow: Revenue strategy trigger, daily mission/logging, weekly/monthly reports, privacy export/delete
integration_issues.issue: Not executable end-to-end because auth and registration are broken upstream.

issues: Tailwind-based visual system not applied due to static asset 500s, causing spacing/contrast/hierarchy degradation to browser defaults.

action_items: Fix Prisma runtime dependency issue: better-sqlite3 native binding not found for current Node/arch runtime.
Update /src/app/rpc/register/route.ts error handling to separate validation (400) from server/runtime failures (500).
Fix Next static asset serving/build pipeline so /_next/static CSS/JS are 200 and UI hydrates correctly.
After above fixes, rerun full authenticated API regression + UI journeys for mission/logs/revenue/reports/settings privacy controls.
critical_code_review_comments: Over-broad catch blocks in API routes (notably register) hide operational failures as client errors and slow RCA.
Prisma adapter setup currently fails at runtime (binding resolution), which cascades across auth and all protected RPC flows.
There is persistent root/workspace lockfile ambiguity warning in runtime logs, indicating consolidation still unstable for deterministic startup behavior.
context_for_next_testing_agent: This run confirms same blockers as prior iterations. Pytest: 28 collected, 21 passed, 3 failed, 4 errors. Failures all map to signup/login inability and protected flow unavailability. Static chunk endpoint check still returns 500 for CSS/JS, so UI remains mostly unstyled.
rca of the issue: Repro: run pytest with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3000 over tests/test_rpc_auth_guards.py + tests/test_rpc_authenticated_flows.py + tests/test_strategy_trigger_scope.py. Authenticated setup fails at /auth/callback/credentials (401) and /rpc/register (400). Supervisor frontend logs repeatedly show: 'prisma:error Could not locate the bindings file ... better_sqlite3.node'. This indicates Prisma SQLite adapter runtime binary mismatch/missing native artifact. In parallel, /_next/static/chunks/*.css and JS requests return 500, causing non-hydrated/unstyled pages. Mitigation: repair Prisma native runtime compatibility and static bundle serving first, then revalidate all required feature flows.
mocked_api: No MOCKED APIs used in this run.
